title: Brook Steals the Road Poneglyph Copy
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Chopper, Brûlée, Sanji, Luffy, Nami, Jinbe as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this rate, we're going to be surrounded!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't let them get outta here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's Boss Jinbe! Wait a second...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?! Aren't there any ways out?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can you take care of the ones behind us, Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah! I've had it up to here with these idiots!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: great. There's more in front, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nami! We came to save you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe this... so we're inside a mirror right now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Jinbe! Why the hell are you with this lot?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This is Betrayal, plain as day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard that despite the fact that you were looking to quit our group,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were too scared to step up to the roulette!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama did protect fishman Island for me! I tried to keep everything on the up and up, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That wheel smells only offdeath and ill will!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you were right not to try your hand at that, jinbe, first son of the sea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is the

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Five years ago, one of my comrades, in hopes of salvation

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: spun that blasted thing. It stole away his life.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The thing is designed to ensure that anyone that spins it, dies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: MAMA doesn't let the leaving live!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've only got Luffy, Brook, and Sanji left!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gimme a break! This is way too many! I can't carry you all!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 49 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
